adr_findings.evidence: internal/panel/gate.go PanelGateDecision is the single relocated home of the contract: N-1 threshold via p.ApproveThreshold() (gate.go:262-269), reviewed_head_sha freshness BLOCK never Warn (gate.go:216-221, §4), dirty-tree BLOCK (gate.go:227-236, §5), §6 asymmetry fail-open on no reg (gate.go:147-150) / fail-closed on malformed reg (gate.go:156-160), §7 hatches: MINDSPEC_SKIP_PANEL env-only via panel.SkipPanelEnv read by os.Getenv only (panel_advisory.go:17-19, gate.go:142-145) and enforcement.panel_gate config toggle (complete.go:277-280, panel_advisory.go:173-176). Block semantics (REJECT/hard_block halt, round mismatch, incomplete) all match §§2-3. Skip var never named in a Block (HC-7) verified by TestPanelGate_BlockNeverNamesSkipVar (panel_gate_e2e_test.go:290).
adr_findings.note: ADR-0037 AMENDMENT NOTE in gate.go:10-23 documents the relocation into the dependency-clean leaf; tests green.

adr_findings.evidence: panelGate emits the Block via guard.NewFailure with the decision message as body and a GENUINE recovery line ('re-run the panel ... then mindspec complete <id>') passed as the LAST/only command arg (panel_advisory.go:198-200) — the raw-git-merge fence stays in the body via RawMergeFence (gate.go:58-63) BEFORE the recovery line. TestPanelGate_SubThreshold_Blocks asserts guard.HasFinalRecoveryLine AND fence presence (panel_gate_e2e_test.go:151-156, green). No panic risk: exactly one non-empty single-line command is always passed, satisfying FormatFailure's ≥1-command requirement (recovery.go:47-48).
adr_findings.note: The relocated decision message is fence-bearing but recovery-free; the recovery line is appended by the caller (gate) and by the hook's toResult mapping identically.

adr_findings.evidence: The authoritative gate consumes the DECLARED bead ID as a structured function parameter: complete.Run(root, beadID, ...) (complete.go:187) passes beadID straight to panelGate (complete.go:281) — no shell/prose parsing in the authoritative path (comment complete.go:255-256). The retained PreToolUse hook command-string matcher is explicitly a non-authoritative defense-in-depth BACKSTOP, behaviorally unchanged, retirement deferred (precomplete.go:431-434) — ZFC-conformant per R4.
adr_findings.note: ADR-0036 establishes Zero Framework Cognition (no heuristic classification); the authoritative path uses a structured arg, satisfying it.

adr_findings.evidence: panel_advisory.go imports NO internal/gitutil — git seams route through internal/executor: gateExecutor = &executor.MindspecExecutor{} with RevParseRef/Status/IsRefNotFound (panel_advisory.go:92-97), which are thin pass-throughs to gitutil isolated in the executor (mindspec_executor.go:602-619). internal/complete is in the lint enforcementPkgs list (boundary_test.go:114) and TestEnforcementHasNoGitLeaks PASSES (verified: ok internal/lint 0.222s). The only gitutil reference in internal/complete is panel_gate_e2e_test.go (a _test.go file, excluded by the lint at boundary_test.go:128).
adr_findings.note: internal/panel stays a dependency-clean leaf; git I/O injected via the GateIO closure seam (gate.go:328-347).

summary: All four cited ADRs conformant. ADR-0037: the enforced contract is relocated intact into the internal/panel leaf and invoked identically by the authoritative in-binary gate and the hook backstop (no drift by construction); thresholds, freshness-BLOCK, fail-open/closed asymmetry, and all §7 hatches honored. ADR-0035: Block emits via guard.NewFailure with the recovery line LAST and the fence in the body; ≥1 command guarantees no FormatFailure panic; HasFinalRecoveryLine asserted green. ADR-0036: the authoritative path consumes the declared bead ID (structured arg), no prose/shell heuristic; retained hook matcher is an explicit non-authoritative backstop (R4). ADR-0030: internal/complete imports no gitutil; git seams route through internal/executor; TestEnforcementHasNoGitLeaks PASSES. No violations.
